## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Sydney Go to her role and GrowthX.ai's operations, focusing on onboarding and upcoming expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai recently implemented a pod structure with managing editors as pod leads, account managers, and writers](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [The company is rapidly growing and evolving, with a focus on scaling high-quality SEO content production](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Sydney will likely manage a combination of existing and new accounts, with specifics to be determined soon](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Onboarding resources include Airtable, Circle (for training), and Fathom (for call recordings and summaries)](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Growth

  - [Shifted from account manager/supporting account manager model to pod structure in December](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Pods typically consist of:](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [Managing editor (pod lead)](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [1-2 account managers](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [3 freelance writers (evolving to potentially full-time)](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Rapid growth from under 20 accounts to current scale](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Hiring for account managers and potentially full-time writers](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Recently added managing director role to oversee 2-3 pods](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Account managers typically produce content week-to-week using workflows](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Writers' roles vary by account:](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Some edit/expand AI-generated content in Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Others trained to generate articles directly using tools like AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Continuous refinement of workflows to address client needs programmatically](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focus on scaling content production while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Onboarding and Resources

  - [Onboarding process acknowledged as needing improvement](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Key resources:](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [Airtable (access pending)](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [Circle: New platform for recorded videos and step-by-step walkthroughs](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [Fathom: For accessing call recordings, transcripts, and AI-generated summaries](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [SEMrush and other SEO tools: Basic understanding required, not deep expertise](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### Sydney's Role and Expectations

  - [Will likely manage a mix of existing and new accounts](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Potential to take over 1-2 accounts from a departing team member](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [May lead a new account pod starting next week (not confirmed)](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Encouraged to provide fresh perspective and feedback on processes](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to provide Sydney access to Airtable and Circle](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Sydney to review onboarding materials, focusing on Circle once access is granted](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Kyle to confirm Sydney's account assignments ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting later in the week to address any questions](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Sydney to familiarize herself with Fathom for accessing past client calls and information](https://fathom.video/share/vuPsKdrfTXYYtA99jrtuahGEsMuYhm_N?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
